case_title: FEALY, PETER vs. WILSON, LLOYD et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER AND ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEALY, PETER
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT WILSON, LLOYD JEPPESEN, JORGEN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FEALY, PETER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-23-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON FEB-28-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JURY ROOM, PRO TEM MORGAN PRICKETT, CSR JOHN LEWIS, CLERK, E.MONTI 3:00 PM. C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, STEVEN ADAIR MCDONALD. DEFTS PRESENT IN PRO PER. A STIPU- LATED JUDGMENT WAS READ INTO THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDG- MENT FOR PLTF FOR REST & POSS OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1607 - 47TH AVE, GARAGE APT, LEFT DOOR. RENT/DAMGES ARE WAIVED. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS. EVICTION STAYED THROUGH 4-1-94, MIDNIGHT, BUT WRIT MAY ISSUE AFTER 3-20-94. NO FURTHER STAYS & MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. SEC DEPOSIT OF $285.00 TO BE GIVEN TO DEFTS TODAY. PREMISES TO BE LEFT IN CLEAN CONDITION. ANY PROPERTY LEFT IS DEEMED ABANDONED. IF DEFT VACATES BY 4-1-94, PLTF TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT WITH PREJUDICE BUT TERMS TO REMAIN IN EFFECT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, LLOYD JEPPESEN, JORGEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1607 - 47TH AVE, GARAGE APT, LEFT DOOR, SF., STAYED UNTIL APR-01-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEC DEPOSIT OF $285.00 TO BE RETURNED TO DEFTS ON 2/23/94. IF DEFTS VACATE BY 4/1/94, PLTF TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT WITH PREJUDICE BUT TERMS TO REMAIN IN EFFECT.
